Success Universe Group Limited ( (HK:0487) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Success Universe Group Limited announced the early termination of the service agreement between SJM Resorts and Pier 16 – Entertainment, leading to the cessation of operations at Casino Ponte 16. This decision impacts the company’s share of profits from the Ponte 16 project, with a significant reduction expected in the Group’s share of results from the associates. Despite this, Success Universe will continue its travel-related and property investment businesses.

More about Success Universe Group Limited

Success Universe Group Limited operates in the travel-related and property investment sectors, with a significant focus on the Ponte 16 project in Macau. The company holds a 49% stake in Pier 16 – Property Development Limited, which is involved in casino and entertainment services.

China SCE Group Holdings ( (HK:1966) ) has issued an update.

China SCE Group Holdings Limited, a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, has announced an amendment to its offshore debt restructuring agreement. The company and the Ad Hoc Group (AHG) have executed an agreement to amend the Restructuring Support Agreement (RSA), which includes providing certain lenders with rights similar to those of the AHG and extending the Longstop Date to July 31, 2026, with a possible extension to October 31, 2026. data.title: Parkson Retail Group Reports Mixed Q3 2025 Results
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Parkson Retail Group ( (HK:3368) ) has issued an update.

Parkson Retail Group Limited announced its unaudited third-quarter results for 2025, revealing a mixed financial performance. While total operating revenues for the third quarter decreased by 1.4% compared to the previous year, the first nine months of 2025 saw a slight increase of 0.2%. Notably, same-store sales experienced significant declines, dropping by 13.8% in the third quarter and 17.2% over the nine-month period. Despite these challenges, the company reported a substantial increase in profit from operations for the nine months, rising by 32.4% to RMB375.2 million. Additionally, the profit attributable to owners of the company improved to RMB23.4 million, reversing a loss from the previous year. This financial performance indicates a positive shift in profitability, although the decline in same-store sales may pose challenges for future growth.

More about Parkson Retail Group

Parkson Retail Group Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the retail industry. It focuses on department store operations and is part of the larger Parkson Holdings Berhad group based in Malaysia.

Average Trading Volume: 4,320,008

Current Market Cap: HK$421.5M
